title: Legendary Titles
description: Completing achievements will grant the player rewards and titles that appear above the player's head.
body:
Epic RPG: Legendary Titles

Legendary Titles is a configurable title system that transforms achievements into visible and meaningful rewards. Every achievement automatically becomes a title, making the mod instantly compatible with any mod that includes achievements.

Titles are displayed above the player’s character and can be customized directly from the Titles Screen. When a player completes an achievement, they automatically obtain the corresponding title.

Customization

Modpack creators can change the names of titles directly in the Titles Screen. With OP + Creative Mode, a special button appears that allows full configuration of each title, including the ability to add attributes that apply to the player while the title is equipped. All of this can be done from inside the game, without editing external files.

Compatibility

Legendary Titles is automatically compatible with:

  • ✔️ Vanilla achievements
  • ✔️ Achievements from other mods
  • ✔️ Achievements created by datapacks

Player Experience

Achievements are no longer just simple notifications—they become milestones with visible titles and optional attribute rewards. This system blends the vanilla foundation with advanced customization, giving players and modpack creators a flexible RPG-style progression tool.

FAQ

Can I use this mod in my modpack?

Yes, you have full permission to use it in your modpack.

🌐 Join Our Discord Community

💡 Submit proposals and suggestions for improving the mods.

🛠️ Report problems and bugs so we can fix them together.

🎮 Show your creativity: you're free to use my mods in your own modpacks.

📢 Share your modpack on the server and show the community your unique style.

This space is designed for us to grow together, with respect and enthusiasm for creating mods and modpacks. Your contribution is always welcome!
